race.comment: LORD ARCADIA (5) led them up over 2200m on the Scarpside course here last start and couldn't hold on, beaten 1.6L. He was third-up there and out 600m, so he'll no doubt benefit from that run. He lost no admirers there and with further improvement on the cards today, he can shed his maiden tag. FARADIO (4) hit the line alongside LORD ARCADIA last time out, also beaten 1.6L in that same race. He gets the winkers on for the first time today. May need a touch of luck from the draw but the form he brings in looks the strongest. RARE HONOR (3) steps up to this trip again today after sticking on gamely behind a smart one on the Scarpside here 10 days ago. The draw is ideal for him and he should get every chance if good enough. GOLD ENIGMA (9) is knocking on the door in recent runs. Tougher here but Pike's booking is a big push. ROCK SILVER (6) can't be discounted off a strong effort here last time out.
